brief.objective: Reassure enterprise prospects and existing customers evaluating our security posture by confirming our data handling practices meet enterprise security standards
brief.audience: Enterprise prospects currently in security review, plus existing customers whose security teams have asked about SOC 2 certification
brief.key_message: Northbridge is now SOC 2 Type II certified, confirming our data handling practices meet enterprise security standards
brief.constraints: Legal constraint: no specific claims beyond what the audit actually covers
